items.title: Here is the full summer league roster. Labaron Philon and Johni Broome are on it, and new two-way signees Caleb Love and Rayan Rupert are not.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Here is the full summer league roster. Labaron Philon and Johni Broome are on it, and new two-way signees Caleb Love and Rayan Rupert are not. 

First game in Vegas is Thursday.

items.title: Sixers going with a rookie-heavy roster. Johni Broome is the only player with NBA experience.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Sixers going with a rookie-heavy roster. Johni Broome is the only player with NBA experience.

items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Introducing your 2026 Summer Sixers, headlined by Labaron Philon Jr. and Johni Broome: www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Sixers announce roster for 2026 NBA Summer League
media.description: The 2026 Summer Sixers are headlined by rookie first-round pick Labaron Philon Jr. and soon-to-be sophomore Johni Broome.

items.title: waiting til the part where Jaylen calls Johni Broome and Dalen Terry
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: waiting til the part where Jaylen calls Johni Broome and Dalen Terry

items.title: It'd be mildly surprising if the Sixers go into the season with Hukporti, Bona and Johni Broome as the top options to back up Joel Embiid. Feels like you could use a solid vet in that mix.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: It'd be mildly surprising if the Sixers go into the season with Hukporti, Bona and Johni Broome as the top options to back up Joel Embiid. Feels like you could use a solid vet in that mix.
